item.title: Best Earbuds Under ₹1000 in 2026 (Top Budget Picks 🔥)
item.description: Find the best earbuds under ₹1000 with deep bass, long battery, and clear calls. Top budget picks in 2026.

item.title: Best Earbuds Under ₹2000 in 2026 (Premium Budget Picks)
item.description: Looking for premium earbuds under ₹2000? Discover top picks with ANC, deep bass, long battery life, and best value for money in 2026.
